title: hammer
description: Basic yet customizable plugin for your Minecraft server. Everything, everywhere, all at once.
body:
### [Our website](http://hamium.xyz/hammer/) | [Documentation](https://hamium.xyz/hammer-docs/) | [Donate](https://ko-fi.com/unium) --- ### A Basic yet customizable plugin for your Minecraft server. An extremely simple and lightweight plugin, that's SUPER customizable!
Some of it's notable features are: 1. **Minimal and speed in mind** - Built with the most minimal things required to achieve things. 2. **TPA** - TPA and TPAHere requests, which allow players to ask to TP to someone else. 3. **Homes** - Allows players to set homes which they can teleport back to. 4. **Teams** - Allows players to create teams! 5. **Chat formatting** - Allows the server owner to change how the chat looks. Supports [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/) for prefixes and suffixes! Few things we're working on: 1. **More server administrating utilities** - Hammer is sort of supposed to be like EssentialX, but it's missing many features. These features will slowly be added over time 2. **Economy with vault** - We are planning to implement an economy module to hammer. However, this will probably be added wayyy down the road, as we are focusing on implementing more important features first. 3. **Even more customization** - Hammer is meant to be "fully" customizable, but it's not quite there yet. 4. **Documentation** - We are also writing documentation for hammer, which will be published soonᵗᵐ. Andddd, that's pretty much it! You can check out some examples of what the plugin looks like in the [gallery tab.](https://modrinth.com/plugin/hammermc/gallery) Also to be clear, we WON'T give full support for hammer *yet!* For now, you will have to rely on the comments in the config file(s). However if you do encounter a bug or want to suggest something, you can DM **leunium** on discord.
